summary: BiciValera full-stack test: backend 12/12 pytest passing (auth, stations, rides start/end, impact, simulator). Frontend mobile flows verified end-to-end: login as demo@valera.com -> map with 8 stations + simulator pill (32 elec / 44 mech / 76 avail) + FAB, Unlock modal 'Simular escaneo' starts a ride and navigates to /activity showing 'Viaje en curso · Bici M-6523 · Desde Plaza Bolívar' with 'Finalizar viaje' button, Impact dashboard renders CO2 hero + user + city stats, Profile shows live fleet + sign out. Tab navigation (Mapa/Impacto/Viajes/Perfil) works.

issues: Custom canvas 'map' is a green grid with markers (no real basemap) - matches spec (no react-native-maps) but users may expect streets; consider adding subtle street labels or lat/lon axis for context.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated, use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated'. Non-blocking but should be migrated for RN 0.75+ compatibility.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated shadow* and props.pointerEvents to boxShadow / style.pointerEvents to silence RN web warnings.
(Optional) Consider adding street/road hints or a compass to the custom canvas map for better spatial context.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes MongoDB _id via ride.pop('_id', None) - good.
Emails are lowercased on register/login (case-insensitive) - correct.
One-active-ride constraint enforced (400 'Ya tienes un viaje activo') - verified.
JWT_SECRET falls back to a hardcoded default - fine for demo but set JWT_SECRET in prod env.
Impact endpoint adds baseline city figures (12480.5 km, +3120 rides) inline - documented as intentional to make dashboard feel alive; consider moving constants to top of file for clarity.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 Valera stations + fleet on startup (idempotent). Tests create TEST_ prefixed users (not cleaned up but harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Demo user demo@valera.com/demo1234 may have an active ride after tests - call POST /api/rides/{active_id}/end or use GET /api/rides/active to check. Register endpoint lowercases emails.
